core_mechanism: reducing a linear-operator eigenvalue problem to finite matrix diagonalization by expanding the operator in a known complete orthonormal basis (a Galerkin/Rayleigh-Ritz spectral projection onto a truncated basis)
brief_reason: The abstract reframes solving the differential eigenvalue equation for bound states as a matrix diagonalization problem in the basis of square-well eigenfunctions, which is exactly projecting a linear operator onto a known complete basis and diagonalizing the resulting matrix.
